title: Task outcome: Read-only audit focused only on provenance/source/chunk/claim lineage and graph health. Identify
summary: Read-only audit of graph health and provenance/source/chunk/claim lineage. Found graph health score reaches 0 because src/graph-health.ts uses a narrow source resolver that ignores accepted-record lineage fields used by writers, especially evidence.source and source_paths. Persisted graph-health artifact reported accepted_without_source_count=302, source_mapping_missing_count=302, score=0. Also found three accepted JSON records currently invalid, which can make a rerun fail before scoring.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Read-only audit of graph health and provenance/source/chunk/claim lineage. Also found three accepted JSON records currently invalid, which can make a rerun fail before scoring.
request: Read-only audit focused only on provenance/source/chunk/claim lineage and graph health. Identify why graph health score can be 0, exact files, and one concrete acceptance gate. Do not edit files.
decisions: Treat the root issue as a lineage schema/resolver mismatch across graph-health, observatory, lifecycle, compounding, and session-promotion writers.
Acceptance gate should add an evidence.source-only and source_paths-only accepted fixture to graph:health:verify and assert these are not counted as missing source when their targets exist.
next_steps: Unify sourcePath/lineage resolution across graph-health, lifecycle, and Observatory.
Extend graph:health:verify with actual accepted-record schemas from compounding and session promotion.
Repair invalid accepted JSON records before relying on a fresh graph-health run.
